Hi, I'm Fam.
Your Virtual Assistant & Operations Leader.

I turn complex operations into smooth, scalable workflows — from client escalations and financial processes to team leadership and event management.

Detail-Oriented Focused Innovative Resourceful

About Me

Over 19 years, I've built deep expertise across banking, mortgage finance, telecoms, and B2B event management. Currently at Concentrix Philippines as a Team Leader, I manage a team of 18 covering event creation, content moderation, chargebacks, legal processes, and payouts for Eventbrite.

My edge: I de-escalate first, solve second. When a client is frustrated, I listen, lower the temperature, then present a clear action plan — turning difficult moments into lasting trust.

My Approach

"Listen first. Understand the emotion. Then solve the problem — step by step — so the client walks away confident, not just satisfied."

What I Can Do For You

Practical support across operations, client management, and team leadership

📅

Calendar & Communications

Scheduling, email gatekeeping, daily agendas, and booking management — so nothing slips through.

🤝

Client & Escalation Support

Multi-channel follow-ups, complaint resolution, and retention — with a proven de-escalation approach.

📣

Social Media & Events

Content creation, paid ads (Facebook/Instagram), Eventbrite management, and lead monitoring.

💳

Financial & Legal Ops

Chargeback disputes, payment reversals, payout management, document reviews, and compliance checks.

👥

Team Leadership & Project Management

Team oversight, onboarding, SOP creation, workflow design, and quality control. I've led teams of 18 and managed multi-track project queues simultaneously.
